narrative:
Recovery Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 878 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 46.1 percentage points.
